svg.text: Latent path · dim 3840 · 30 heads (head_dim 128) · parameters reconciled with a live model dump
computed at embed · used by every attention
used by all 30 main DiT layers, as well as the 2 + 2 noise/context refiner layers
(the context refiner uses the same block but omits the adaLN modulation column)
no GQA: n_kv_heads = n_heads = 30 · bias-free projections
gated MLP, not a plain 2-layer MLP
the same 256-d vector drives AdaLN in the noise
refiner, all 30 main blocks and the final layer —
dims shown per token unless noted; N = image patches, L = prompt tokens
